verdicts.corrected_value: A platform for creators to sell digital and physical products; provides an OAuth-based REST API plus a license-key verification endpoint.
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage supports the claim that Gumroad is a platform for creators to sell products.
The URL for authentication methods returns a 404 error, making it impossible to verify the claim.
The help center confirms that users can register an OAuth application and generate access tokens without human approval.
The API documentation confirms that it is a REST API with various endpoints.
The existence of a public REST API and self-serve OAuth application creation supports the claim of buildability.
